evals.prompt: I just started a new project and want to track my feature work. Set up project tracking for me.
evals.expected_output: Guides user through init → import flow. Explains what the database does. Runs init_db.py, then offers to import specs from job-queue.

evals.prompt: What's the status of my current projects? How many tasks are pending vs completed?
evals.expected_output: Runs the dashboard command. Presents project status with metrics. Shows pending vs completed task counts.

evals.prompt: I just finished speccing out the file upload feature with /spec-plan. Now I want to track the implementation tasks in pm-db.
evals.expected_output: Imports specs from the job-queue feature folder. Creates project and spec records. Shows what was imported. Connects spec-plan output to pm-db tracking.
